title: Session recorder
description: Record a terminal session from the per-terminal ⏺ title-bar button and play it back later at the original recorded size. The library window (the (+) menu) lists broker-stored recordings; playback offers pause, 0.25×–8× speed, continuous reverse, a scrubber timeline, and timestamped notes. Output is captured byte-faithfully; input is recorded as markers only (never keystroke content). Recordings persist server-side beside the state store until deleted.
author: JohnConnorNPC
